name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in the verifier, host, guest, or batch tooling
title: ''

---

## Bug Report

### Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the bug.

### Affected Area

Tell us whether this affects the host, guest, reduced verifier crates, VM comparison, batch corpus, CI, or documentation.

### Reproduction Steps

List the commands, batch numbers, inputs, or environment details needed to reproduce the issue.

### Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

### Current Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

### Environment

Include relevant OS, Rust, CUDA, GPU, Git LFS, branch, or commit details.

### Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. If applicable, add screenshots or links to artifacts.

### Log Output

```text
Paste any relevant log output here.
```
